psbA.name: PSII D1 reaction center protein
psbA.function: Primary quinone acceptor QA/QB; water-splitting Mn4CaO5 cluster ligand; core of O2 evolution. Light-driven charge separation P680→Pheo→QA→QB.
psbA.targeting: N-terminal chloroplast transit peptide (CTP, 45 aa); import via TOC/TIC
psbA.elysia_homolog: psbA retained from Vaucheria litorea chloroplast
psbA.hgt_note: Constitutively present in Elysia chlorotica; expressed from nuclear locus

psbD.name: PSII D2 reaction center protein
psbD.function: Binds Pheo, QA, nonheme Fe; forms heterodimer with D1; required for PSII assembly

psbO.name: Manganese-stabilizing protein (MSP / OEC33)
psbO.function: Stabilizes Mn4CaO5 oxygen-evolving complex; essential for water oxidation. This is THE Elysia HGT gene — found in E. chlorotica nuclear genome, transferred from Vaucheria litorea. Proves algal→animal HGT is viable.
psbO.targeting: bipartite signal: ER signal + thylakoid lumen targeting
psbO.location: thylakoid lumen, luminal face of PSII
psbO.elysia_homolog: DIRECT — this gene was found in E. chlorotica nuclear genome by HGT
psbO.hgt_note: Key proof: nuclear psbO in Elysia maintains stolen chloroplast long-term. μ∘δ=id: the host nucleus recovers chloroplast function losslessly.

psbB.name: CP47 (chlorophyll a-binding protein)
psbB.function: Inner antenna of PSII; 16 chlorophyll a molecules; energy transfer to P680

psaA.name: PSI P700 reaction center protein A
psaA.function: Core PSI subunit; binds P700, A0, A1, FX; drives NADPH production via Fd

psaB.name: PSI P700 reaction center protein B
psaB.function: PSI heterodimer partner to PsaA; required for P700 formation

petA.name: Cytochrome f (petA)
petA.function: Plastocyanin reduction; b6f complex; connects PSII→PSI electron chain

petC.name: Rieske Fe-S protein (PETC)
petC.function: 2Fe-2S cluster; electron transfer in b6f complex; rate-limiting step

atpB.name: ATP synthase CF1 beta subunit
atpB.function: Catalytic subunit; proton gradient → ATP; 3 copies per CF1 head

rbcL.name: RuBisCO large subunit (rbcL)
rbcL.function: CO2 fixation: RuBP + CO2 → 2×3-PGA. Rate-limiting enzyme of Calvin cycle. Must assemble with RbcS (8L+8S holoenzyme) for function.
rbcL.note: Must co-express with rbcS; separate cassette required

rbcS.name: RuBisCO small subunit (rbcS)
rbcS.function: Assembles with rbcL (8L8S complex); modulates active site geometry

Lhcb1.name: LHCII type-I chlorophyll a/b binding protein
Lhcb1.function: Major light-harvesting complex; 14 chlorophyll, 3-4 xanthophyll; captures photons 400-700nm; NPQ photoprotection
Lhcb1.note: Expressed under Turing-pattern promoter — defines the green spots

CHLH.name: Mg-chelatase H subunit (CHLH/GUN5)
CHLH.function: Rate-limiting step in chlorophyll biosynthesis: Mg insertion into protoporphyrin IX. Also retrograde signaling sensor.

CAO.name: Chlorophyllide a oxygenase (CAO)
CAO.function: Chlorophyll a → chlorophyll b; expands absorption to 650nm; required for LHCII stability

TOC75.name: Translocon outer chloroplast envelope 75 (TOC75)
TOC75.function: Beta-barrel channel; main protein import pore in outer envelope; required for all CTP-tagged proteins to enter plastid
TOC75.delivery: lentiviral (expressed first; enables all other imports)
TOC75.note: Express TOC75 first — enables import of all other CTP-tagged proteins

TIC110.name: Translocon inner chloroplast envelope 110 (TIC110)
TIC110.function: Inner envelope import channel; forms complex with TIC40; links to chaperone network in stroma

YABBY1.name: YABBY1 (abaxial identity TF)
YABBY1.function: Drives abaxial (lower-leaf) cell fate; reprogrammed here as chloroplast-expression activator in skin Turing pattern. Synthetic variant fused to VP16 activation domain.
YABBY1.note: Expressed only where Turing activator > threshold; drives all photosynthetic genes
